item.title: The whole warehouse is gone
item.description: Ukraine has hit a major storage warehouse for the Russian version of Amazon. A major step up in the 40 days promised of increased and protracted escalation from the Ukrainian military. Slava Ukraine.

item.title: Russian military is using Wildberries (the russian version of amazon) for logistics. Ukraine took notice and removed Wildberries (in Moscow) from existence.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Fucking Funny How "Judicial Independence" Gets Really Flexible Around Billionaires
item.description: One of the strangest fucking debates in modern politics is whether Supreme Court justices should accept lavish gifts from billionaires. Imagine explaining that sentence to someone in 1990. "Wait... that's... legal?" Judges are supposed to be independent. Not sponsored. If your highest court starts looking like an influencer posting "Thanks to my generous benefactors!" we've wandered into a parody of democracy. ⚖️ Notice how every proposal for stronger ethics rules is treated as some outrageous assault on the judiciary. No, Karen. The assault is creating a system where public trust depends on hoping nobody's yacht invitation influences anything. The rule shouldn't be controversial. Justice shouldn't come with complimentary vacations, luxury hospitality, or billionaire perks. If people lose faith that the referee is impartial, eventually they stop believing in the fucking game. ⚖️ #SupremeCourt #Ethics #JudicialIndependence #RuleOfLaw #Accountability #Democracy #Politics #Transparency
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Well hello, Miss Polite
item.description: @IsAHotdogASandwich is adopting Guillermo (who, as it turns out, is a girl, so she calls her “Gigi”), but I’m fostering her until she can get spayed. I had an absolute shit show of a day at work today and little Gigi is very patiently and politely waiting for sone pets. Look at her. Too cute. Oh, and I have sone update pictures and videos of Sweet Potato Casserole that I promise to post once I wake up from a quick(?) nap! Long day, short nap. That is the hope.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: MS NOW Senior Nat'l Security Reporter - David Rohde: Trump's newly declassified documents undercut his claims on China and rigged elections. – He declassified his own Daily Briefings (LMAO when he was President) as some sort of delusional proof
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Harry J. Sisson: "The guy (John Solomon) that Trump hired to investigate elections just admitted on camera after his speech tonight that there's no evidence the 2020 election was unfair and then he got rushed away from journalists by Trump's team"
item.description: Marc E. Elias and his legal team successfully defended against the vast majority of 62 post election lawsuits brought by DJT and his allies to challenge the 2020 election results.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1751 (beach episode)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Hell yeah
This feels @phuckedinphilly coded.
Technically a Griffinfly. But yeah, we're talking American Robin-sized
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Glory Pippin! Thank you." ___ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Vaughn Hillyard: John Solomon, a member of Trump's election task force says intelligence does not support Trump's election fraud claims.
item.description: Vaughn Hillyard is a journalist for MS NOW. This interview was right after Trump's Thursday night address on alleged election fraud.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: GovBrief Today #533
item.description: Ordinary people just cost ICE's jailers their lender. For months they protested outside Citizens Bank branches from Washington to Vermont and moved $300 million to other banks. On Friday, Citizens said it will stop lending to GEO Group and CoreCivic, the private prison companies that run ICE's biggest detention centers. The bank swears the decision was purely business, but it made that announcement one day before thousands of people planned to show up at its branches again. John Lewis called this form of protest good trouble. Three days of voter registration and civil rights organizing in his name run through the weekend at hundreds of locations. Public pressure moved a bank this week. I've emailed 8,277 stories over 533 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260717-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/wildfire-tariffs [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-july17 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/kenya-quarantine [4] https://go.govbrief.today/taylor-tacobell [5] https://go.govbrief.today/mullin-elections [6] https://go.govbrief.today/lindell-registration [7] https://go.govbrief.today/state-grants [8] https://go.govbrief.today/nj-weapons-ban [9] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-supports-graham [10] https://go.govbrief.today/good-trouble [11] https://go.govbrief.today/pollinators [12] https://go.govbrief.today/citizens-bank Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Memes vol 723
item.description:
This looks SO gross im vegetables biggest hater. I would have gotten scurvy back in the day
I asked my dad if we were doing stuff for Father’s Day and he said no so I said great I’m going to go see a movie and he said what movie and I said Leviticus (my first mistake) because then he texted me later WITH THAT ITS GAY AND LIKE YEAH I KNOW
LOOK AT THIS
This isn’t Bruce but it could be
Gertie tax
Bruce tax
Nessie tax. Ok y’all here’s the deal. @DietCokeIsMyDrugOfChoice asked me a very important question and the answer has gotten completely out of my control but the post is including like my whole life story with pictures because it’s gotten too big to post in a musicals dump so I just have to let you know because I love to overshare and it’s going to be SO MUCH oversharing I’m so excited. Toodles.
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: *counts fingers* wait a minute…
item.description: Edit: this appears to be parody. The worm driving this reanimated corpse may not have said these words. It’s funny tho, and well… I mean… we can all see him say it

item.description: We all are fairly demonizing the guy but the reality is that he’s working for a conservative shadow state that’s tearing us apart. Even my dog understands it.

26 Man Tax: Alessandro Nivola
"The secret of being happy consists of knowing how to enjoy yourself—enjoy being at table, in bed, enjoy standing up, sitting down, enjoy the nearest ray of sunshine, the slightest bit of landscape: in other words, love everything." - Gustave Flaubert So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.title: ICE officer in Maine shooting has history of violent behavior
item.description: This *person*, David Brouillette, shot and killed Johan Sebastián Durán Guerrero. As a surprise to nobody, he should never have passed vetting to carry a gun. https://apnews.com/article/ice-david-brouillette-johan-guerrero-maine-shooting-dbc30d6d59e2a95fb470afc188e125c6 David Brouillette has a history of terrifying and violent behavior, according to those relatives. They accuse him of attacking women in his life over the years, and one shared a voicemail with the AP from last winter in which he told her that he thought someone should slit her throat. Hundreds of family court records obtained from the Augusta District Court clerk’s office detail years of allegations of physical and verbal abuse raised by his second ex-wife on behalf of herself and his daughters Brouillette, 37, told his ex-wife Ashley Brouillette late last year that he had been hired by ICE. She said that because of his long history of psychiatric issues, she thought he was having a mental health episode and she didn’t believe him. She didn’t realize he’d been telling the truth until this week, when videos began circulating online of the moments surrounding the shooting. Ashley Brouillette told the AP that she spoke to her ex-husband in a Facebook audio call, and he acknowledged that he had killed Durán Guerrero. Their 18-year-old daughter, Madison Brouillette, also told the AP that her father called her Wednesday and said that he shot and killed Durán Guerrero.
item.dc:creator: zordac
